Contributing to Python
======================

Countless organizations, enterprises, and individuals rely on Python, and if you have spare development time,
it would honestly be better spent contributing to Python itself ([see their contributing doc](https://github.com/python/cpython?tab=contributing-ov-file))

<br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br>

###### Contributing to Triangle
<details>
    <summary>.</summary>
    If you're into optimization and implementing cool new features rapidly, without unit tests, without documentation
feel free to reach out, or submit a pull request for bugs.
</details>
